extra.reason: MVP code complete: tasks 1-10. 13 unit tests pass. Review fixes applied (single time.Now per event, robust closeLocked, AppCache concurrency docs). Task 11 manual smoke moved to its own issue.
MVP shipped in commits 0abf730..fb9637a; umbrella commit forgot to flip bd state
Bypassed via iTerm2 Prefs → General → Magic → 'Allow all apps to connect' (acceptable on single-user machine). Follow-up filed as it2ks-ls3 to revisit proper file-based trust.

Fixed via 433c05b. SubscribeToGenericNotifications was passing empty session string, which iTerm2 rejects with SESSION_NOT_FOUND. Now uses 'all'. Also: basic subscribe → unsubscribe → advanced subscribe so iTerm2 doesn't return ALREADY_SUBSCRIBED and drop the advanced flag. Verified locally: log shows both 'down' and 'up' events. Bonus fix: JSON-decode iTerm2's variable returns so app tag is 'node' not '"node"'.
